title: Senior Doctor - Dr. Reddy's Laboratories - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Dr. Reddy's Laboratories - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
